mapper.select: SELECT id,item_name itemName,subject_code subjectCode,remark,create_by createBy,create_time createTime,update_time updateTime FROM tb_item_config WHERE id=#{id}

SELECT id,item_name itemName,subject_code subjectCode,remark FROM tb_item_config
item_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR subject_code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')
SELECT id,item_name itemName,subject_code subjectCode,remark FROM tb_item_config WHERE subject_code=#{subjectCode}
